{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150609AD542D3DE9CCA3C8589C"}"},"total":537},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7564041752089510718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事情节感人，描写细腻，入木三分，人物形象饱满，代入感很强，作者文笔功夫很好，只是希望主角早点从前生的阴影中走出来，活在当下，珍惜眼前。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761142961,"group_id":"7552443403795975193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9wypGCbpu7y2CrrSAMsZCQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"791290562225870","user_name":"爱吃麻辣兔腰的巩乔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"791290562225870","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552443403795975193","book_info":{"abstract":"国际暗网叱咤风云的佣兵之王林枫，惨遭背叛，被一发导弹送上西天。再睁眼，竟魂穿成同名同姓、被酒色掏空身体的废物纨绔？！首富老爹一怒之下直接将他扔进部队回炉重造。

新兵连里，人人嘲讽他是走关系的关系户，等着看他笑话。却不知这副弱鸡身体里，装载的是史上最硬核的兵王灵魂！5公里越野？前世武装负重翻倍！格斗技巧？秒杀教官！战术理论？他玩的就是实战！

靠着非人意志，林枫疯狂改造身体，从吊车尾一路逆袭，打破纪录，惊掉全军下巴。本以为能低调发育，第一次探亲假却遭遇烈火噬楼！危急关头，消防员均已撤离，听闻仍有孩童被困，他毫不犹豫逆着人群冲向火海！

【全网热搜：烈焰英雄！他用燃烧的脊梁托起生命！】
一张他浑身着火却紧抱孩子的照片，引爆全网！军方高层震动：这小子，必须重点培养！

从此，林枫的军旅人生像开了挂！新兵二等功，特种破格录取，国际赛场为国争光！一代纨绔彻底逆袭，成为令敌人闻风丧胆的国之利刃！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/933245eb4cbb6d7c53d62eb2a7caa2c6","author":"江子岳","author_id":"","book_id":"7552443403795975193","book_name":"刚重生成首富阔少，就被送去当兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552449176416551449","read_count":"20302","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1589992"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"402","tags":"都市日常,都市,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f1bdcaeae1091b984ea49c38332d22a2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174369&x-signature=%2F4qakk7cb63R7EOiB9VX1Gb6Hm8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111061311122","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150609AD542D3DE9CCA3C8589C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":40148,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44011,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":25214},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1763296838,"author_reply_time":1761321397,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578513487098823448","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看啊，爽文，爱国情怀，希望是无女主的，不想看男主的感情线，看到作者写那个苏晴还有韩警花的时候，就不太满意，那个苏大小姐，第一次和男主见面，就显得很自大，以为所有男人都会跪在她的石榴裙下，看到男主不理她，还对他更感兴趣了，你配吗你就感兴趣，是不是还想说：男人，你成功引起了我的注意？还有那个韩警花，不知道男主的身份的时候，就道德绑架男主，自己干不明白事，就把锅和责任甩到男主身上，明明是自己道德绑架，求着男主帮忙的，真的很无语啊。但是其他的我都很满意，非常的满意，男主的身份本来就不适合有老婆，毕竟太危险了，而且感情线也不好写，写不好的话，会变成一锅美味汤里的老鼠屎，会让人感到很膈应的，有可能会因为这颗老鼠屎，弃了这锅汤的，男主是把命奉献给国家的，男主只有一个爱人，那就是祖国！好看！爱看，作者多更新一点，希望每天一百章，每天六点钟起来疯狂码字，晚上12点睡觉，时间这样安排就很合理啊哈哈","text_exts":[{"e":63,"s":60,"text":"大小姐","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773990369A3C8589C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227578513487098823448%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227552443403795975193%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764511964,"group_id":"7552443403795975193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0+lBxO6ZnKM2PASChpoVm4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b604c806ccde4700b61ec928093339e3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536725&x-signature=76Uh3ggFttmSLiDfleP4zn3pV8M%3D","user_id":"107814274929","user_name":"夜曦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"107814274929","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1690342191,"is_worn":true,"sti ser_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574061537374552857","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，情节紧凑，环环相扣，没有多余的水字数。主角从前世的佣兵到今世的军人，身上多的不仅仅是民族认同感，更是一份沉甸甸的责任，从此他拥有的不仅是软肋，更是坚不可摧的盔甲。很喜欢这种成长性，不是那种过于超脱实际或者说魔化的主角，期待接下来的剧情。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763474764,"group_id":"7552443403795975193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwXRiueZ2zWW6Zd2yIvVPSw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dcc3829939364713899d7c987b0224dc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528461&x-signature=KJaG3cGTUuENU0yesmSzh%2B4U0j4%3D","user_id":"61160388566861","user_name":"我对拉格朗日过敏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"61160388566861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1782872830,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552443403795975193","book_info":{"abstract":"国际暗网叱咤风云的佣兵之王林枫，惨遭背叛，被一发导弹送上西天。再睁眼，竟魂穿成同名同姓、被酒色掏空身体的废物纨绔？！首富老爹一怒之下直接将他扔进部
